digest.en: Iran Foreign Minister has stated that the US blockade is an act of war that violates the cease-fire. Iran is set to restart domestic flights and chart a phased airspace reopening. The US and Iran are engaged in uncertain peace talks as the ceasefire deadline looms.
digest.hi: ईरान और अमेरिका के बीच तनाव बढ़ रहा है। ईरान ने अमेरिका को चेतावनी दी है कि अगर वह हमला करता है तो वह एक और नरक बना देंगे। इस बीच, पाकिस्तान ने ईरान के साथ बातचीत में शामिल होने की बात कही है।

articles.title: Iran Foreign Minister Says U.S. Blockade Is Act of War, Violates Cease-Fire
articles.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister said the US blockade is an act of war and violates the cease-fire. Iran Foreign Minister Says U. S. Blockade Is Act of War, Violates Cease-Fire WSJ.

articles.title: Iran to restart domestic flights; charts phased airspace reopening
articles.summary: Iranian government sources plan to restart domestic flights, initially allowing overflight operations that will benefit international airlines connecting Europe and Asia, including Indian carriers. Iranian government sources told The Hindu that they plan to first reallow overflight operations that will bring a huge respite to all international airlines connecting Europe with Asia, including Indian carriers.

articles.title: Israeli Soldiers Sentenced to Jail for Damaging Jesus Statue in Lebanon
articles.summary: Israeli soldiers were jailed for damaging a Jesus statue in Lebanon. A statue of the crucifixion of Christ has been replaced after one soldier photographed another swinging what looked like a sledgehammer at its head.

articles.title: Vance not yet left for Iran talks, still in Washington to participate in meetings, says White House
articles.summary: Pakistan's Information Minister said the country has yet to receive a formal response on Iranian participation in talks. Meanwhile, over 11.6 lakh Indians have returned from West Asia amid the conflict.

articles.title: Magyar says Netanyahu will face arrest in Hungary
articles.summary: Hungary's Magyar said Netanyahu will face arrest due to an ICC warrant. In 2024, the ICC issued an arrest warrant for Netanyahu over allegations of crimes against humanity and war crimes, including starvation as a method of warfare, in Israel's war against Hamas in Gaza.

articles.title: Trump says U.S. in ‘very, very strong’ position for Iran talks
articles.summary: US President Trump stated the US is in a "very, very strong" position for Iran talks. He suggested Iran could improve chances of successful peace talks by freeing eight women facing execution.

articles.title: Uncertainty swirls around US-Iran peace talks as ceasefire deadline looms
articles.summary: US-Iran peace talks are uncertain as the ceasefire deadline approaches. Live updates: Uncertainty swirls around US-Iran peace talks as ceasefire deadline looms CNN.

articles.title: Trump Says He Does Not Want to Extend Cease-Fire as Iran Insists It Will 'Not Negotiate Under
articles.summary: Trump does not want to extend the cease-fire as Iran refuses to negotiate under threat. Trump Says He Does Not Want to Extend Cease-Fire as Iran Insists It Will 'Not Negotiate Under Threat' Time Magazine.

articles.title: Fed nominee Warsh spars with Democratic senators over asset divestment plan
articles.summary: Federal Reserve nominee Kevin Warsh plans to sell "virtually all" his assets within 90 days. This was his response to questioning by Democratic senators at a Senate hearing on his asset divestment plan.

articles.title: Cuba confirms recent talks with visiting U.S. delegation
articles.summary: Cuba held recent talks with a visiting U. S. delegation. The U. S. negotiators set conditions for continued negotiations, including the release of prominent political prisoners. negotiators laid out several conditions for negotiations with Cuba to continue, including the release of prominent political prisoners.

articles.title: Amnesty warns that 'predator' leaders seek to impose new 'world order'
articles.summary: Amnesty International Secretary General Agnes Callamard criticized U. S. President Donald Trump, Russia's Vladimir Putin, and Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu as "predators". She warned they seek to impose a new world order.

articles.title: Israeli sexual violence helping push Palestinians from West Bank: Report
articles.summary: A report by an NGO found at least 16 cases of conflict-related sexual violence against Palestinians in the West Bank, attributed to Israeli settlers and soldiers. This has contributed to the displacement of Palestinians from the region.

articles.title: US "Ready To Go" On War Path. Iran Prepares Fresh Targets, "Surprises"
articles.summary: Iran has stated it is prepared for war with "new surprises" if necessary. The US has also indicated readiness for conflict, with Iran reportedly preparing fresh targets in response. Tensions have escalated between the two nations.

articles.title: EU court rules Hungary’s LGBTQ law violates human rights
articles.summary: The European Court of Justice ruled Hungary's LGBTQ law violates human rights. The law, introduced by PM Viktor Orban's government, breaches EU law on multiple levels. European Court of Justice says measure by PM Viktor Orban's government breaches EU law 'on a number of separate levels'.

articles.title: Pope warns humanity's destiny could be 'tragically compromised' and calls on politicians to respect
articles.summary: Pope warned humanity's future risks being "tragically compromised" due to a breakdown of international law and political responsibility. He called on politicians to respect their responsibilities to protect the planet.

articles.title: Mexico pyramid shooting was 'planned' attack: security officials
articles.summary: Mexican security officials say the Teotihuacan pyramids shooting was a planned attack. One person was killed and 13 injured in the incident. A Mexican prosecutor said the attacker at the Teotihuacan pyramids "planned his violent acts" after one person was killed and 13 were injured.

articles.title: Zelensky says failure of US envoys to visit Kyiv is 'disrespectful'
articles.summary: Ukrainian President Zelensky says US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner's failure to visit Kyiv is disrespectful. They have travelled to Moscow several times but not to Kyiv. US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.

articles.title: Uncertainty clouds Iran talks as ceasefire deadline nears
articles.summary: Iran's participation in talks is still uncertain, with Pakistan's Information Minister stating that a formal response is awaited, as a ceasefire deadline nears. As of 7:30 p. m. Pakistan time, a formal response about Iran’s participation “is still awaited”, Pakistan’s Information Minister said in a statement.

articles.title: Can Israel’s economy sustain conflicts on multiple fronts?
articles.summary: Israel's war with Iran cost 35 billion shekels ($11.52 billion) in budgetary expenses. Its operations in Gaza till 2025 will cost around 8.6% of its annual gross domestic product. The Bank of Israel’s preliminary estimates suggest that Israel’s war with Iran came at the cost of 35 billion shekels ($11.52 billion) in budgetary expenses.

articles.title: Carney names broad team to advise on tense US-Canada trade talks
articles.summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has named a 24-member advisory committee to advise on US-Canada trade talks. The committee includes Conservatives and former provincial premiers.

articles.title: Israeli soldiers punished over vandalism of Jesus statue in Lebanon
articles.summary: Two Israeli soldiers will be removed from combat duty and receive 30 days of military detention for vandalizing a Jesus statue in Lebanon. Two soldiers will be removed from combat duty and receive 30 days of military detention, Israel's military says.

articles.title: युद्ध के लिए तैयार ट्रंप, ईरान ने दी चेतावनी- एक और नरक बना देंगे

hi.title: युद्ध के लिए तैयार ट्रंप, ईरान ने दी चेतावनी- एक और नरक बना देंगे

articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र में 81 साल का रिकॉर्ड टूटने की संभावना है। दो महिला उम्मीदवारें पहली महिला महासचिव बनने की दौड़ में सबसे आगे हैं। यह जानकारी Patrika News ने दी है।

articles.title: कौन हैं नमिता थापर जो नमाज़ की तारीफ़ करने पर हो रही हैं ट्रोल
articles.summary: नमिता थापर एक बिज़नेसवुमन हैं जो नमाज़ पढ़ने से स्वास्थ्य को होने वाले फ़ायदों पर एक रील बनाने के बाद चर्चा में हैं। उनकी इस पोस्ट पर लोगों की प्रतिक्रिया मिली है और वे अब ट्रोल हो रही हैं।

articles.title: कत्ल-ए-आम को धर्म का नाम देकर जायज ठहराने की कोशिश कर रहे ईरान-इजरायल-अमेरिका?
articles.summary: ईरान, इजरायल और अमेरिका पर कत्ल-ए-आम को धर्म का नाम देकर जायज ठहराने की कोशिश करने का आरोप लगाया गया है। यह जानकारी NDTV. in ने दी है। कत्ल-ए-आम को धर्म का नाम देकर जायज ठहराने की कोशिश कर रहे ईरान-इजरायल-अमेरिका?

articles.title: अमेरिका आख़िर ईरान की किन 'ताक़तों' से बात कर रहा है?
articles.summary: अमेरिका ईरान की विभिन्न 'ताक़तों' से बात कर रहा है। ईरान के अलग-अलग नेता अलग-अलग बयान दे रहे हैं, जिससे सवाल उठता है कि अमेरिका आख़िर बात किससे कर रहा है।

articles.title: विकलांग को मारी गोलियां, बंदी को चट्टान से फेंका: युद्ध अपराध के आरोप का सामना करता सैनिक
articles.summary: एक सैनिक पर युद्ध अपराध के आरोप लगे हैं, जिसमें विकलांग को गोली मारने और एक बंदी को चट्टान से फेंकने के आरोप शामिल हैं। अदालत में पेश किए गए दस्तावेज़ों में इन आरोपों का ब्योरा सामने आया है।

articles.summary: पाकिस्तान शांति वार्ता के दौरान लकड़ी लेकर फंस गया। भारत ने कूटनीतिक तरीके से 대응 किया। वार्ता में तनाव कम करने के प्रयास किए जा रहे हैं। इसे कहते हैं कूटनीति!

articles.title: 86 साल पुराने इस 'घर' में आज भी हर रविवार होती है नीलामी
articles.summary: रसल स्ट्रीट पर स्थित 'द रसल एक्सचेंज' में हर रविवार नीलामी होती है। यह 86 साल पुराना ऑक्शन हाउस अंग्रेज़ी हुकूमत के दौर से नीलामी करवा रहा है। यह क्षेत्र पहले कई ऑक्शन हाउस के लिए जाना जाता था।

articles.title: UN दूत बोलीं-भारत ने इजराइल की मदद कर कानून तोड़ा: हथियार भेजना नियमों के खिलाफ, इससे ग्लोबल सिस्टम

articles.summary: भारत ने UN में सुधार की मांग की है. सुरक्षा परिषद में ग्लोबल साउथ को अधिक प्रतिनिधित्व देने की आवश्यकता है. इससे वैश्विक स्तर पर न्याय और समानता बढ़ेगी. UN में जोरदार सुधार की मांग, भारत बोला-सुरक्षा परिषद में ग्लोबल साउथ को मिले अधिक प्रतिनिधित्व Navbharat Times।

articles.title: 'राजा शिवाजी' में है भारी-भरकम कास्ट, रितेश देशमुख ने लिए 15 करोड़; जेनेलिया और संजय दत्त ने ली
articles.summary: फिल्म 'राजा शिवाजी' में रितेश देशमुख ने 15 करोड़ रुपये लिए हैं। जेनेलिया और संजय दत्त भी इस फिल्म में हैं। यह फिल्म इस साल की सबसे ज्यादा इंतजार की जाने वाली फिल्मों में से एक है।
